---
title: "RMT 2026 Summer School: Optimization and Random Matrix Theory"
date: 2026-06-28
categories: ["learning dynamics", "scaling laws", "optimization", "SGD", "Muon", "random matrix theory", "learning theory"]
description: "Some of my takeaways from [Courtney Paquette](https://cypaquette.github.io/)'s minicourse at the 2026 Random Matrix Theory summer school at the University of Michigan."
---
